name: Full Blood Count (FBC)
preparation: No specific fasting required. Stay well hydrated before blood draw.

name: Fasting Blood Glucose (FBG)
preparation: Strict overnight fasting for 8 to 12 hours is mandatory before collection.

name: Lipid Profile Panel
preparation: Fasting required for 9 to 12 hours. Avoid alcohol 24 hours prior.

name: Liver Function Test (LFT)
preparation: Certain medications might interfere. Discuss with your physician.

name: Kidney Function Test (E/U/Cr)
preparation: Avoid eating high amounts of meat 24 hours before taking the test.

name: Thyroid Panel (T3, T4, TSH)
preparation: Inform lab technicians if you are currently taking thyroid supplements.

name: Hepatitis B Surface Antigen
preparation: No specific preparation required. Walk-in screening available.

name: Typhoid Dot Test
preparation: No special fasting parameters required for this antibody scan.

name: Pelvic & Abdominal Ultrasound
preparation: Drink 1 liter of water 1 hour before scan. Do not empty your bladder.

name: Digital Chest X-Ray
preparation: Remove all metallic objects, jewelry, and piercings before imaging.

name: Electrocardiogram (ECG)
preparation: Avoid applying oily body lotions or creams to chest area on scan day.

name: Obstetric Ultrasound Scan
preparation: Hydrate adequately as instructed by your antenatal care coordinator.

name: Echocardiogram (Echo)
preparation: Wear a loose, comfortable two-piece outfit to simplify lead placement.

name: Glycated Hemoglobin (HbA1c)
preparation: Can be performed at any time of day. Fasting is completely optional.

name: Mammography Screening
preparation: Do not use underarm deodorants, body powders, or perfumes on scan day.
